name: Stacked New Mexico Quesadilla
keywords: cheese mexican main dish vegetables poultry
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Spread 1/4 of the Red Pepper-Sour Cream Sauce evenly on one side of a tortilla.
3. Layer 1/4 of the shredded chicken, salsa, zucchini, and bell pepper over half of the tortilla.
4. Sprinkle with 1 tablespoon of melted butter and top with 1/4 cup Monterey Jack cheese.
5. Fold the tortilla in half, covering the cheese.
6. Place on a heated skillet and cook until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes per side.
7. Flip using tongs or a spatula to avoid splattering and continue cooking until fully warmed through and cheese is melted.
8. Cut into wedges and serve hot.
